rule: raw:design-strategy-strategy-exploration-omega-cycle (hive raw 47) + raw:audit-append-only-ledger (hive raw 77) + raw:proof-carrying (hive raw 73 honesty admissibility) + raw:ai-native-error-message (hive raw 66) + raw:hard-implementation-default (hive raw 43) + own:atlas-absorb-mandatory (nexus own 1)
purpose: First real-network kick(ω-cycle) execution beyond infrastructure smoke. Goal was to exercise nexus kick bench across all 3 registered backends (claude_code/codex_cli/gemini_cli) and capture the 5 perf axes. Outcome: PARTIAL — single-backend live-spawn through `nexus kick run` succeeded end-to-end (haiku topic, claude_code only), but the kick_bench multi-backend orchestrator was not invoked in live mode this cycle (sub-agent ran kick run directly + bench in --dry-run only, presumably budget-care). This witness records what was proven AND what remains — fail-loud against any silent claim of multi-backend success.
trigger: user 2026-04-26 prompt sequence: '실전 첫 kick — 어떤 design/research 토픽?' → '모두 병렬 발사' (3 parallel: push + atlas backlog kick + multi-CLI bench kick). Sub-agent picked 'kick bench smoke 2-line haiku poetic devices' as the bounded topic.
noise_topology_framing: outside-the-well noise injection at abstraction stage (α absorbed-primitive sample / β QRNG byte / γ bridge-driven reframe) — see architecture witness for full framing. This cycle inherits verbatim.

pre_registered_falsifiers.name: real-network
pre_registered_falsifiers.criterion: each invoked backend's noise envelope source field shows real LLM child sessionID OR explicit OFFLINE-FALLBACK; no --dry-run shortcuts

pre_registered_falsifiers.name: perf-axes-comparable
pre_registered_falsifiers.criterion: per-backend bench JSONL has all 5 axes populated with real numbers (or NaN with documented reason)
pre_registered_falsifiers.verdict_check: jq '.wall_time_ms != 0 and .cost_usd != "?"' on bench JSONL rows

pre_registered_falsifiers.name: dedup-jaccard-real
pre_registered_falsifiers.criterion: dedup_ratio computed against actual prior witnesses for the chosen topic-slug, not a placeholder. If no prior, it is 0.0 with comment
pre_registered_falsifiers.verdict_check: compare bench JSONL dedup_ratio_vs_prior to hand-computed jaccard over design/kick/*<topic-slug>*.json

pre_registered_falsifiers.name: absorb-loop-fires
pre_registered_falsifiers.criterion: each successful per-backend run produces a witness JSON that gets atlas-absorbed (Triad L2 canonical witness_emit). Verify shards n6/atlas.append.<run-slug>.n6 exist post-bench
pre_registered_falsifiers.verdict_check: ls n6/atlas.append.<topic-slug>.n6 must exist for each landed witness

pre_registered_falsifiers.name: graceful-degradation
pre_registered_falsifiers.criterion: if a backend errors mid-run (network / rate-limit / auth fail), bench continues with other backends + records the failure cleanly + raw 66 reason+fix trailer
pre_registered_falsifiers.verdict_check: grep status=fail rows in bench JSONL; verify other backends still recorded

obstructions.step_1_identification: kick_bench live-run path was not exercised; sub-agent ran bench --dry-run + kick_run separately rather than `kick bench` without --dry-run.
obstructions.step_2_documentation: OBSTRUCTION_DOCUMENTED: the multi-backend orchestrator semantics (per-backend kick_dispatch invocation + per-backend witness landing + 5-axis JSONL emission) is intact in code (verified by reading tool/kick_bench.hexa:442+) but UNPROVEN at runtime. F33 + F34 thus PARTIAL — claude_code single-backend proves the per-backend leg; the orchestrator wrapper is unverified.
obstructions.step_3_structural_reframe: Reframe: this cycle proves the bench-axis design (5 perf axes are computable in dry-run + dedup_ratio is real + per-backend status field works) AND the per-backend live-spawn primitive (via kick_run). Next cycle (carry-forward bench-orchestrator-smoke) just needs to invoke `nexus kick bench <topic>` without --dry-run + verify all 3 backend rows have status=fire OR documented status=fail.
obstructions.step_4_sanity_check: kick_bench code path:442-490 reads cleanly, has parent_sid forwarding, error capture, witness path parsing. No structural blocker — only runtime exercise missing.
obstructions.step_5_cumulative_learning: Sub-agent budget-care is a design constraint to make explicit in prompt: when user says 'real bench' the agent should fire the orchestrator at least once for the smallest topic, not just dry-run + single shot.

obstructions.step_1_identification: gemini_cli registry slot exists but `which gemini` was not run this cycle.

obstructions.step_3_structural_reframe: Inherit obs_1 reframe (registry slot pattern): not_installed is a valid runtime state, recorded probe-ts + concrete install-hint.
obstructions.step_5_cumulative_learning: every bench cycle should log explicit probe results per registered backend even when nothing changed — empty probe = silent assumption.
